Working with Marta has been one of the best decisions I have made.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ6UbgfQt444kR3pdgxb29VeY/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBenV1R2ZnEAE
reviews.text:
I am a patient of Dr. Nada in my 3rd year of hormone therapy. At first I was very apprehensive about this treatment.  But after watching a special on PBS about the benefits of Bio Identical Therapy I decided to give it a try. I did my research online and found Dr. Nada. Upon my first visit, I was greeted by a warm & welcoming office staff who made me feel very comfortable.  Their work character and manner was most satisfactory.  My appointments are always made at my convenience and the office staff always very enthusiastic about my success with my treatments.  They go above and beyond to respond to my emails or calls not only during work hours but also on weekends.
On my first visit  Dr. Nada was very understanding of my apprehension and gently approached all my concerns and questions.  I find her to be genuinely interested in my personal needs and very attentive to every detail of my overall health.  She has provided guidance throughout my treatments which has improved my overall health. (emotionally and physically)  I personally like the individual treatment approach instead of the one size fits all.  Unfortunately insurance  does not cover these treatments and it is quite expensive.  I have made sacrifices to afford these treatments so I can attain a better quality of life.  And it is working!
I must admit this is the one doctors visit I look forward to!
Thank you Dr. Nada for all your personal attention and your expertise in this field!  A second thank you from my husband!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ6UbgfQt444kR3pdgxb29VeY/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxbjV5U3hRRRAB
reviews.text: I had a difficult time with Bodylogic MD.  They do not listen to the patient and the treatment is decided regardless of your feedback.   After numerous visits with no success I cancelled my 4th in person  appointment.  I explained that I was promised changes would be made  the last visit and I showed up and they ask me to take no change one last time on my pellet.   Before my next visit I ask if the treatment was changing.  I was told NO. Once I cancelled I had already located another provider that my sister n law recommended.  My current provider could not believe how low some of my levels were and completely changed my treatment.   They have tweaked my treatments so now I truly feel the benefits.  I did provide this feedback to the office administrator and ask that she pass along to the Dr.  I told them I wouldn’t continue because I was not being heard.  There are many options out there!   Do your research.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ6UbgfQt444kR3pdgxb29VeY/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtck0tM3BnRRAB
reviews.text:
Prying on desperate people. No empathy charging an arm and a leg for their questionable services.

Didn't even ask me what was troubling me and tried to convince me that a comprehensive panel saliva test run by Verisana was not accurate enough.

Didn't ask about my medical history or what symptoms I was having. There was no concerns about any of that important stuff.

Also, no doctor should charge an entrance fee of $299 just to get accepted. Let alone charge $599 for just the first 60-minute appointment. None of which is covered by insurance.

The entire conversation was an obvious sales pitch. But what kind of doctor needs to use a sales pitch to get new patients?

reviews.name: places/ChIJ6UbgfQt444kR3pdgxb29VeY/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzcXZLZzR3RRAB
reviews.text: I agree with the review about the woman who answers the phones. She basically told me within 30 seconds that this practice was not for me because I questioned getting 60 panels of blood work done before speaking to a doctor at all about any of my symptoms. I've had integrative doctors before that meet with you first, have you fill out a lengthy medical history eval and speak with you face to face about what you're experiencing. This woman explained that this is not how they do it and seemed almost threatened by my questions. I think that is is unethical to do any kind of blood work without first speaking to a doctor. I have no doubt that this doctor could be as amazing as everybody says but unfortunately they need to have a different approach for people who are new clients.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ6UbgfQt444kR3pdgxb29VeY/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLdUo2eWZBEAE
reviews.text: This review is intended for the office staff. I have not met any of the doctors so I can not comment on the practice or the medicine. I reached out to find a new doctor, while the woman who spoke to me was very helpful in giving me the information on a doctor I had to stop her and let her know that unfortunately I do not see male doctors. She sounded incredibly dumbfounded, couldn't understand why and then continued to ask me why would I feel that way. I told her I feel comfortable with female doctors only, she said it was really unfortunate and didn't understand and disagreed with me then told me to have a nice day. I was shocked by the way I was dismissed and thrown aside. I felt so awful and I couldn't shake off the way I was just talked to so I called back to ask why she did not recommend the other female doctor, she said she was not available and there was nothing she could do for me. I let her know I felt incredibly dismissed and she should have just told me that in the first place and NOT ask why I felt so uncomfortable with a male doctor. She dismissed me again and told me to have a nice day. PLEASE body logic PLEASE educate your staff on the way they speak to potential patients. You don't ask a person why they don't want to see a male doctor, you don't dismiss the fact you disrespected someone's feelings and you certainly don't talk over them.

reviews.name: places/ChIJm1IklZlw44kRBHCsIHGmNbs/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXeGZIOU5nEAE
reviews.text:
As all other reviews have pointed out this is a dishonest and disorganized practice, where no one takes responsibility.

The first call is like a snake-oil salesman pitch - where I was told hormones I was taking for a short amount of time would not impact the hormone test Dr. Nada Milosavljevic, MD requires to be done through her company/partner only, which is of course not true. Then I was given a list of a bunch of fees to "register",  have the preliminary  tests before meeting with the doctor, and following appointments with Dr. Nada totalling to thousand(s). All the quotes given initially were false and the soon turned out to be double or triple the price. Dr. Nada's office waits until you have already spent a bunch on other things like registering and blood tests to start double/triple charging.

Then the hormone test itself, no one tells you it's 19 days after your last cycle. You figure this out on your own - further delaying your appointment. This lab lost all my paperwork documenting the time of the tests making it highly inaccurate. To worsen this experience, after being told by Dr. Nada's office it was covered under my insurance (I had two insurances) and if not, worse case scenario it would be about $200 out of pocket. The lab gets the test to process and tell me it's not covered under either insurance, and they confirm in writing they won't process  by email due to this and the issues with processing in time and accurately (it's also been 2 weeks since they received at this point). Then without permission, and after telling me it won't be processed they send me an over TWO THOUSAND DOLLAR BILL!!! That's a lot different than covered by insurance or worst case $200 bill.

Additionally, I asked multiple times where to send results from my endocrinologist and specialists that gave a deep view into my holistic health, including hormones -- the whole reason I'm paying Dr. Nada out of pocket to look at holistically  - no response. They only cared about the tests they get paid off of.

Results came in from labs that required a blood transfusion and urgent care, Dr. Nada and her staff were non existent and I had to book other doctors in the months waiting period of meeting Dr. Nada, although already paid, and Dr. Nada received these labs.

In addition, Dr. Nada's office gave away 2 of my appointment times. Then on the day of my actual appointment asked to change a day before, so I moved a meeting at work to accommodate them  and then they no-showed -- why might you ask? Because they tried to call in the morning for ANOTHER PAYMENT and couldn't reach me, never emailed or asked for this before.

Then when I said I cannot continue because I have written documentation of the multiple times you've been dishonest - they blamed corporate although every interaction had been with their team, took no responsibility and sent me to the better business bureau to report the franchise, not their practice. This place could care less about your health, and most certainly lies about what you will be paying out of pocket.

Which is unfortunate as many of us would be happy to pay for honest and genuine care. As someone who works in this space, and has deep experience in how these tests and practices should work, please do trust this practice with your health.

reviews.name: places/ChIJm1IklZlw44kRBHCsIHGmNbs/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzaGZTejFnRRAB
reviews.text: When all else failed I turned to the expertise and professionalism of Dr Nada and her elite staff to help make me the best I could be.  I had gained weight, lost energy and my cholesterol was through the roof.  I called and spoke to Ali at the front desk who was able to get me in quickly due to a cancellation.  Dr. Nada scheduled lab work so she could understand what was going on with my body and then prepare an attack plan to get me back on track.  We covered diet, supplements, exercise and even life choices.  3 Months later I am down 20 pounds, my muscle mass is coming back in, my cholesterol has dropped to the point I no longer need Statins !!! and my energy has been renewed.  I can't Thank Dr Nada and her team enough.  Caring, professional, and always a phone call away to answer questions.

Offices are pretty, sleek... what you always envisioned your man-cave should be... but at the end of the day your wallet pays for it.   If you can afford it, you will be offered executive level concierge services, where you will receive "enhanced access to Dr. Morgentaler via email, text, and phone, as warranted; a dedicated phone line to his assistant; priority appointments with extended visit lengths; unlimited visits per year; and a private waiting lounge with complimentary snacks and refreshments."

Maybe that's why the Yelp reviews are so poor overall, its the everyone else who doesn't get special treatment.

If you want a place with pretty shiny chrome art on the wall, leather couches, and plush carpet, this is your place.  If you want top notch urological care.  There are other options.

reviews.text:
Tired? No appetite? Lacking the ability to flip a Honda Fit with one arm while battling a bobcat?

I've been a Boston Vitality patient for a couple months and I have to say the transformation has been like night and day. I was worried my testosterone levels had been sinking with age so I decided to do a consultation. It couldn't have been easier. The amazing staff set up my appointment to have my levels checked the same day and then we were off to the races. My treating provider at the clinic explained the results, answered all my questions, and then started me on a regimen.

The medication comes from a reputable compounding pharmacy and is shipped right to my door with all the necessary supplies. There are videos on the Boston Vitality website walking you through how to administer the medication and the staff is happy to answer any question you have. The manage your levels with routine blood draws and adjustments. I love that follow up appointments are virtual so I can do them on the go.

Going on TRT has been transformative. I can't thank them enough for making the process so simple and safe.

reviews.name: places/ChIJeeHuB8qG44kR0nlHnO_b4ww/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pjdGVVWkhNa2s1YzFwV04yZEJZMmhZYkdWQ1VXYxAB
reviews.text:
I can’t say enough good things about Helen.
She is incredibly skilled, thoughtful, and truly has her clients’ best interests at heart. She has years of experience, and it really shows in her work — I never look “overdone,” just refreshed and like the best version of myself. In fact, I constantly get compliments on how young I look, including recently being told I look eight years younger than I actually am(!).
One thing I really respect is her integrity. Helen has never raised her price per unit for Botox since she opened, and she’s never tried to upsell me on anything unnecessary. She listens carefully, gives honest recommendations, and only does what actually makes sense for you.

She’s also incredibly attentive to individual skin needs. For clients with thinner or more sensitive skin (like me!), Helen adjusts needle size and uses specialized, light-guided techniques to help minimize bruising, along with different needle points depending on the area. These are the kinds of thoughtful details many providers don’t even consider, but they make a huge difference in both comfort and results.

Beyond her talent, Helen is genuinely kind and caring. You can tell she truly wants her clients to “age perfectly,” not change their faces. I always leave feeling confident, natural, and well taken care of. I wouldn’t trust anyone else. Thank you, Helen!

reviews.name: places/ChIJeeHuB8qG44kR0nlHnO_b4ww/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21RdFRGQTJUV0ppUkdobWVHMU1XbmRpYTBGbWNWRRAB
reviews.text: Helen and Liz have given me my confidence back and I don’t know if I can ever truly express my gratitude for them. Walking through the doors at Age Perfctly is more like a visit with the best hype team of friends you could ever ask for! Friends with injectables and lasers and the knowledge and precision to use them beautifully. Helen is the most honest and talented injector. You never walk out overdone and she will take her time to talk through all of your questions and concerns…and never once will you feel pressured to do services you are on the fence about. Liz - you have given me back confidence that I was certain was gone for good. I was born with a birthmark on my cheek that was changing/worsening/darkening with my hormones as I age. Liz took a slow, but calculated approach with different lasers to tackle it. The results are like night and day! No more people stopping me to ask what happened to my face. No more insecurity about walking out without makeup. I will forever be grateful that you and I stopped to chat one day after my appointment with Helen. You ladies are truly the best and I will happily recommend Age Perfectly to everyone I know!

reviews.name: places/ChIJF3oPBNkH5IkRJdPye_FMCVI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT20xMmJtRTJRazR6V0VZME1rTlJiM00xTTBWWE5WRRAB
reviews.text:
I had such a great experience at Optimal Wellness  and felt compelled to leave a review. As someone in my late 30s, I’ve noticed weight loss has become much harder over the past few years. I had success with a weight loss clinic a couple of years ago, but when they closed, I was searching for a new provider that offered medical support without a one-size-fits-all approach.

I found Optimal Wellness through a pharmacy recommendation, and scheduling was easy, including weekend availability. From the moment I walked in, the facility exceeded my expectations.  It’s beautiful, modern, clean, and very professional.

I met with Chantelle, the nurse practitioner, and she was fantastic. She took her time, truly listened, and didn’t rush my appointment. In the past, my experience elsewhere was a quick visit where I was handed a generic weight loss sheet and sent on my way. At Optimal Wellness, the experience was completely different. She walked me through a personalized plan with clear calorie targets for maintenance and different weight-loss goals, along with access to a patient portal full of recipes, resources, and education so I actually feel supported instead of left to figure things out on my own.

I also appreciated that they understand weight loss isn’t one size fits all and were open to strategies I’ve had success with before, like intermittent fasting. Communication through the portal is easy and professional, just like a traditional doctor’s office. I also received a B12 shot during my visit and already feel an increase in energy.

What really sets Optimal Wellness apart is that they offer much more than weight loss, including support for women approaching perimenopause and menopause. I feel like I received far more value than expected and would absolutely recommend Chantelle and Optimal Wellness to anyone looking for personalized, professional care.

reviews.text: Just had my first visit today . Chantelle was super kind , personable , and I felt like I had an actual appointment vs someone just trying to have me in and out taking my money . I used to go to auburn weight loss clinic which was a in and out experience just to give me my script and sent me on my way , dingy and dark . If you’re looking for a professional to help with your weight loss along with wellness this is the place to go !
